name: monorepo
description: Monorepo con Turborepo: Astro (docs), React.js (frontend) y Fastify (backend).

scripts.build: pnpm run sync:env && turbo run build --filter=backend --filter=frontend --filter=docs
scripts.prismaReset: cd backend && npx prisma migrate reset
scripts.clean:install: node ./global/clean.js && pnpm install && pnpm run sync:global && pnpm run sync:env
scripts.codegen: cd backend && pnpm run codegen && cd.. && pnpm run sync:global
